scripts.dev:all: fuser -k 3000/tcp 3001/tcp 5000/tcp 2>/dev/null; npm run dev --workspace backend & npm run dev --workspace frontend
scripts.dev:clean: fuser -k 3000/tcp 3001/tcp 5000/tcp 2>/dev/null; rm -rf frontend/.next && npm run dev --workspace frontend
scripts.dev:reset: fuser -k 3000/tcp 3001/tcp 5000/tcp 2>/dev/null; rm -rf frontend/.next && npm run dev:all
